visual_description: The man in a brown suit rides a bicycle ahead of a line of cyclists wearing colorful jerseys and helmets, all moving along a sunlit road. The camera follows them as they pass a field with rows of vines, then shows a wider view of the peloton stretching across the road. The cyclists are tightly grouped, leaning forward in a racing posture under a clear blue sky.
audio_description: Ambient sounds of wind and bicycle wheels accompany the scene, with no clear speech.
